thought.text: CMake 未纳入新文件，我将显式加入源码列表。

tool_call.name: file_editor
tool_call.arguments:
{"command": "str_replace", "path": "/workspace/YatCC/task/4/CMakeLists.txt", "old_str": "file(GLOB _classic_src *.cpp *.hpp *.c *.h)

add_executable(task4-classic ${_classic_src})
", "new_str": "file(GLOB _classic_src *.cpp *.hpp *.c *.h)
list(APPEND _classic_src ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/SimpleOpt.cpp ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/SimpleOpt.hpp)

add_executable(task4-classic ${_classic_src})
", "security_risk": "MEDIUM", "summary": "Explicitly add SimpleOpt sources to task4 build"}

summary: Explicitly add SimpleOpt sources to task4 build
